proxemics.note: applies to both no-skeleton and skeleton variants

mmew_emotion.note: same SOTA for apex / clip / CoT variants

affwild2_au.paper: Hierarchical Granularity Alignment and State Space Modeling for Robust Multimodal AU Detection in the Wild

affwild2_va.paper: Team RAS in 10th ABAW Competition: Multimodal Valence and Arousal Estimation Approach

affwild2_expr.paper: A Two-Stage Dual-Modality Model for Facial Emotional Expression Recognition

meld.note: applies to V+A and V+T variants; audio-only SOTA is 0.601
meld.paper: A Mixture-of-Experts Model for Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversations

emotic_discrete.model: Robust Emotion Recognition in Context Debiasing

videocoatt_detection.note: metric is accuracy (previously f1=0.523 was wrong metric)

videocoatt_localization.note: was 0.628 in table (typo, missing leading 0); SAGD paper value 0.121 may use different eval protocol

mustard_with_context.note: metric is accuracy/Acc2 (previously macro_f1=0.880 was wrong metric)
mustard_with_context.paper: MuVaC: A Variational Causal Framework for Multimodal Sarcasm Understanding in Dialogues, WWW2026

mustard_no_context.note: metric is accuracy/Acc2 (previously macro_f1=0.747 was wrong metric)
mustard_no_context.paper: MuVaC: A Variational Causal Framework for Multimodal Sarcasm Understanding in Dialogues, WWW2026

urfunny.paper: Dark Humor Understanding via Multimodal Open-Ended Reasoning
